mapper.sql: t.id, t.callback_log_id, t.order_id, t.business_type, t.external_system_name, t.external_business_no, t.idempotent_key, t.callback_status_value, t.callback_result_code, t.event_time, t.request_body, t.response_body, t.process_result, t.manual_override_flag, t.process_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_callback_log t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_callback_log t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_callback_log t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_callback_log ( callback_log_id, order_id, business_type, external_system_name, external_business_no, idempotent_key, callback_status_value, callback_result_code, event_time, request_body, response_body, process_result, manual_override_flag, process_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{callbackLogId}, #{orderId}, #{businessType}, #{externalSystemName}, #{externalBusinessNo}, #{idempotentKey}, #{callbackStatusValue}, #{callbackResultCode}, #{eventTime}, #{requestBody}, #{responseBody}, #{processResult}, #{manualOverrideFlag}, #{processTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_callback_log ( callback_log_id, order_id, business_type, external_system_name, external_business_no, idempotent_key, callback_status_value, callback_result_code, event_time, request_body, response_body, process_result, manual_override_flag, process_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.callbackLogId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.externalSystemName}, #{item.externalBusinessNo}, #{item.idempotentKey}, #{item.callbackStatusValue}, #{item.callbackResultCode}, #{item.eventTime}, #{item.requestBody}, #{item.responseBody}, #{item.processResult}, #{item.manualOverrideFlag}, #{item.processTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_callback_log t SET
t.callback_status_value = #{callbackStatusValue},
t.callback_result_code = #{callbackResultCode},
t.process_result = #{processResult},
t.manual_override_flag = #{manualOverrideFlag},
t.process_time = #{processTime},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_callback_log t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
